news.t: Norway's April core inflation rises in line with expectations

holdings.infoBox: NORW is an equity ETF with a total of 64 individual holdings. The top holdings are DNB Bank ASA stock at 11.20%, Equinor ASA at 10.94%, Norsk Hydro ASA at 6.32%, Kongsberg Gruppen ASA at 5.79%, and Aker BP ASA at 4.85%.

overview.description: The Global X MSCI Norway ETF (NORW) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Norway IMI 25/50 index, a market-cap-weighted index of Norwegian stocks. NORW was launched on Nov 9, 2010 and is issued by Global X.

data.title: Norway's April core inflation rises in line with expectations
data.text: Norway's annual core inflation rose in line with expectations in April, Statistics ​Norway (SSB) data showed on Monday, supporting expectations interest ‌rates could increase further this year.
